ffmpeg_missing: ⚠️ FFmpeg is not installed. Install now?
ytdlp_missing: ⚠️ yt-dlp is not installed. Install now?
install_transparency_desc: SoundSync starts Windows Package Manager (winget), accepts the package agreements, and installs the selected tool into your user/system PATH. Depending on your Windows setup, an installer or UAC prompt may appear briefly. SoundSync checks the installation again afterwards.
install_confirm:
SoundSync will now install {tool} via Windows Package Manager (winget).

Package: {package}
This accepts the winget source and package agreements. Windows may briefly show a prompt or installer.

Continue?
install_log_wait: Please wait. This can take a few minutes depending on your connection; the app will respond again once winget finishes.
install_log_restart_hint: winget reports that {tool} is already installed. If SoundSync still cannot find it, restart the app or Windows so PATH is refreshed.
install_pot_confirm:
SoundSync will now set up the bgutil PO-Token Provider automatically.

This will:
- ask Windows for administrator rights
- install Node.js LTS via winget if needed
- download bgutil-ytdlp-pot-provider.zip into the yt-dlp plugin folder
- download the provider into %USERPROFILE%\bgutil-ytdlp-pot-provider
- run npm install and npx tsc to build the provider script
- write a setup log into %TEMP%

Windows Defender will not be disabled or bypassed. If Windows asks, you must approve the installation yourself.

This can take a few minutes. Continue?
pot_provider_log_detail: SoundSync asks for administrator rights, downloads the yt-dlp plugin, prepares the bgutil provider, and installs Node.js only if it is missing.
pot_provider_missing: PO-Token Provider is not set up yet
confirm_cancel: Do you really want to cancel the download?
system_dependencies_missing: Required system components are missing. Please install them.
auto_scroll_desc: Automatically scroll to new log entries.
auto_scroll_tracks_desc: Automatically scroll to the active track in the list.
eco_mode_desc: Reduces CPU usage when running in the background.
tv_mode_desc: Enlarges the UI for TVs and enables keyboard arrow navigation.
auto_detect_url_title: Automatically detect YouTube/SoundCloud links from clipboard
search_empty_state: Enter a search term to find music.
trending_desc: The most popular tracks from YouTube Music
use_urls_prompt: {count} links detected. Use the first one or collect all?
theme_desc: Adjust the accent color and background
bg_desc: Choose a custom image for the glass effect
remote_desc: Scan the code to send links from your phone
auto_detect_clipboard_desc: Automatically detects links in the clipboard.
ai_tagging_desc: Automatically embeds metadata and cover images into the files.
discord_rpc_desc: Show your current download status in Discord.
ytdlp_pot_desc: There are plugins for yt-dlp (such as bgutil-ytdlp-pot-provider) that automatically generate valid PO-Tokens in the background. These can be integrated into yt-dlp if needed.
queue_desc: Links copied in the background or sent from the extension will be collected here.
queue_empty_state: The queue is empty. Copy links or use the browser extension.
duplicate_queue_prompt: This link is already in the queue. What should happen?
after_download_desc: Choose what to do when all downloads are finished.
install_transparency_desc_html: SoundSync starts Windows Package Manager (winget), accepts the package agreements, and installs the selected tool into your user/system PATH. Depending on your Windows setup, an installer or UAC prompt may appear briefly. SoundSync checks the installation again afterwards.
log_update_check_failed: ℹ️ Update check: Could not connect to GitHub
log_restarting_for_path: Restarting application to apply PATH changes...
log_auto_start_cancelled: ⚠️ Auto-start cancelled: folder is missing or a download is already running.
log_extension_link_queued: 🔌 Link received from browser extension and added to queue
log_clipboard_urls_queued: 📥 Added {count} clipboard links to the queue
log_batch_started: 🚀 Batch download started for {count} queued tracks...
error_help_ytdlp_missing: Install yt-dlp from the system check or restart SoundSync after installing so the PATH is reloaded.
error_help_ffmpeg_missing: Install FFmpeg from the system check. Audio conversion and video merging need FFmpeg.
error_help_cookies: Select a valid cookies.txt file from your browser. This is often needed for private, age-restricted, or YouTube Music content.
error_help_invalid_url: Check the link or copy the direct YouTube, YouTube Music, SoundCloud, or Spotify URL again.
error_help_unavailable: The track may be private, deleted, region-locked, or rights-restricted. Cookies or another link may help.
error_help_network: Check your internet connection, VPN/proxy, and firewall. Then try the track again.
error_title_folder_permission: SoundSync cannot write to the target folder
error_help_folder_permission: Choose another target folder or check write permissions for the current folder.
error_help_unknown: The raw details are shown directly below in the log. Updating yt-dlp or retrying with cookies often helps.
notification_url_detected_body: YouTube/SoundCloud link found. Use it in the app? {url}
notification_urls_detected_body: {count} YouTube/SoundCloud links found. Add them to SoundSync?
